problem id: 5d0db0d2
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) OR SHR(3)

examples:
  11011001 -> 10011111
  00101010 -> 10100111
  01111010 -> 10101111
  01011111 -> 11111111
  00010010 -> 00100011
  10011011 -> 10111011
  00011101 -> 11010011
  11001011 -> 10111101

query: 01111111
predicted answer: 11111111
